Option.Description: Instead of using terraform, use another binary such as terragrunt. Defaults to 'terraform'.
Offer to execute 'terraform state mv' commands. If TfPlanPath specified, the command assumes TfPlanPath is in your tf project directory.
Path to your Terraform project. This mode will generate the plan for you.
tfplan json file to scan. Use 'terraform plan -out plan.tfplan' then 'terraform show -json .\plan.tfplan > plan.tfplan.json' to generate.
Instead of using terraform, use another binary such as terragrunt. Defaults to 'terraform'.
Offer to execute 'terraform state mv' commands. If TfPlanPath specified, the command assumes TfPlanPath is in your tf project directory.
Path to your Terraform project. This mode will generate the plan for you.
tfplan json file to scan. Use 'terraform plan -out plan.tfplan' then 'terraform show -json .\plan.tfplan > plan.tfplan.json' to generate.
Instead of using terraform, use another binary such as terragrunt. Defaults to 'terraform'.
Offer to execute 'terraform state mv' commands. If TfPlanPath specified, the command assumes TfPlanPath is in your tf project directory.
